title: 嗚呼、美しき我が御世よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O's first three years are a resounding
success and a fitting origin story for the Centurial
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she makes her morning entrance, the curtains
open.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! I'm indestructible! My supreme rule
begins now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, again, I am victorious... My castle's
treasury is already filled to the brim with G1
trophies.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hnngh... Second again... I'd like to win at least
once.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As per usual, T.M. Opera O takes first place with
Meisho Doto in second!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
No one can break their one-two finish. No one!
They've established a true dynasty!

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's over... It's all over... No one else will ever take
the G1 crown again.

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's the dark ages... We're doomed, I tell you!
DOOMED!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's not like we're about to die here, come on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smiles have disappeared from the many faces
within Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Centurial Overlord's looming presence is now
a dark cloud. It crushes their dreams, one after
another.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, heh heh heh... Hehehehehe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! How beautiful! Is it not the most
splendid sight you've ever beheld?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Complete domination, like I had always dreamed
of!
choice_data_list: Don't you think... this is a bit much?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I, um... might agree. Everyone seems a little
shaken.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, nonsense. You simply do not see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Look there! Behold the scene!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dark clouds suddenly part and a beam of
light illuminates the training center.

text_block_list.name: Fiery Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O... As soon as I debut, I swear I'm
gonna take you down!

text_block_list.name: Cool Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Heh, yeah right. Good luck coming up with a
strategy when there are no openings.

text_block_list.name: Cool Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: We'll both get our butts handed to us.

text_block_list.name: Fiery Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Well... How 'bout training with me? If we put our
heads together, we can come up with something
to end her reign!

text_block_list.name: Cool Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be caught dead teaming up with you...
But I guess I've got no choice. You're on!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Shadows exist when there is light. Hope is born
from despair. And...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So long as the Centurial Overlord remains, others
will join forces to topple her reign!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Beneath a kingdom of terror, new buds take hold
within the earth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An iron fist ensures that they will grow stronger
still.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My dream has been realized. Under the Centurial
Overlord's absolute rule, brave souls rise to
challenge it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That endless cycle of strife shall drive my eternal
kingdom to completion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It is domination under the name of
inspiration. Haaah hah hah hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all this time, T.M. Opera O's true plan is
coming to light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But something about it feels a little improvised on
the spot... I'll refrain from asking.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! Perfect as always, Opera O. Then, what
happens when the ultimate hero is born?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent question. The chosen hero will one day
arrive at my castle gate, and the final battle will
commence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall defeat said hero by the slimmest of
margins, thus shattering their heart and soul to
shards!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! It is back to square one, hero! Off
to fringe theatre with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike a demon lord, she doesn't consider losing
to be a possibility.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O narrows her eyes and looks down
from the rooftop onto the world below.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahh! This beauty... My kingdom absolute.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The verdant fields through which I run. the
pleasant shade cast by the towering zelkova
trees... Nature's beauty is marvelous.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and all those who serve me standing at my
side... The bonds we hold are beautiful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And those who stand against me? Beautiful are
the flowers which bloom in the face of adversity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Above all, I am overwhelming, absolute, and
infinite...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I, the Centurial Overlord, do truly shine! T.M.
Opera O—the epitome of beauty!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: HAAAH HA HA HA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's everyone's ruler, aspiration, and greatest
fear. T.M. Opera O reigns over all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tale of this momentous time will surely be
passed down through generations of Umamusume
as the greatest drama ever written.
